results.rendered_html:
dṛḍhāyu or dṛḍhā˚yus, m. ‘firm-lived’, N. of the son of Purū-ravas and Urvaśī,  MBh. i ;;
of a prince,  ib.  v ;
of one of the 7 sages of the south,  ib.  xiii ;
of a son of the 3rd Manu Sāvarṇa.
